chunks.text: Nikunj Oza presents NASA's perspectives on Deep Learning - EECS at Berkeley CS alumnus Nikunj Oza (M.S. ’98/Ph.D. ’01), now a research scientist in the Intelligent Systems Division of the NASA Ames Research Center, talks about NASA’s perspectives on Deep Learning for an HPC User Forum video. He presents a broad overview of work at NASA in data sciences, data mining, and machine learning, and delineates the roles of NASA, academia, and industry in advancing machine learning to help solve NASA’s problems. Categories Alumni Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
